The high volume of tailings produced at the facility and the typically low concentrations of substances can create large variances in reported quantities from year to year. in 2020 specifically, there were two samples below detection limit whereas only 1 sample was below DL in 2019

in past years all fine tailings and coarse tailings samples were testing below detection limits for thallium and thus recorded as zero concentration. In 2020 two samples tested at the detection limit and therefore, due to the large tailings output, thallium quantities meet the NPRI threshold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Change to PM10 and PM2.5 emissions in 2022 was due to update of particle size allocations (emission factors) for various process stacks to use 2008 SRC particle sizing analysis results for fine PM emissions. Previous factors conservatively allocated all PM emissions from multiple emission sources as PM2.5 and PM10 emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Change to PM10 and PM2.5 emissions in 2022 was due to update of particle size allocations (emission factors) for various process stacks to use 2008 SRC particle sizing analysis results for fine PM emissions. Previous factors conservatively allocated all PM emissions from multiple emission sources as PM2.5 and PM10 emissions.
